content.text:
The neighbor atoms of atom index 22 (Carbon) are:

- Atom index 18 (element: C)
- Atom index 21 (element: C)
- Atom index 23 (element: C)
- Atom index 26 (element: H)

The geomconf_index for this molecule is **8317**.

Regarding file organization, I recommend creating a dedicated folder (e.g., "molecule_data_8317") and moving the following files into it:
- .geomconf_8317.xyz.view.json
- file_log.txt
- geomconf_8317.xyz

This will help keep the working directory organized.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
